metadata.description: Visual thinking surface for AI-human collaboration — Drafted plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: drafted
plugins.description: Visual thinking surface for AI-human collaboration. Claude writes research, strategy, copy, designs, code, or any other content as frames on a shared real-time canvas — so teams can see, compare, and refine AI output without drowning in chat. Skills library captures org SOPs so the team's best patterns propagate automatically. Bundles the MCP server + a Drafted skill + six slash commands (/drafted:status, /drafted:share, /drafted:new-project, /drafted:focus, /drafted:skills, /drafted:save-skill).
